summary.lv: Credit Solutions (Mellenu Holding uzņēmums — SMScredit.lv, Ondo.lv, Vivus.lv) meklē tīkla administratoru augstas noslodzes tīkla pārvaldībai lokālās un mākoņvidēs — Fortigate, Aruba, AWS, BGP/IPSec; hibrīda darbs Rīgā ar gada prēmiju.
summary.en: Credit Solutions (a Mellenu Holding company behind SMScredit.lv, Ondo.lv and Vivus.lv) is hiring a Network Administrator to manage a high-load network across on-premise and cloud environments — Fortigate, Aruba, AWS, BGP/IPSec; hybrid in Riga with an annual bonus.
